PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Madrone Bray appeared via zoom (pro per) .

Ms. Brey stated that she will retain counsel to assist her. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Aug-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Madrone Bray appeared via zoom (pro per) (petitioner).

Ms. Bray is requesting to continue to her matter, that she will attempt to serve and file the DE-121 form, and that its in their best intrest to remain in living in the property since they have nowhere else to go.

The Court suggested retaining a counsel to help with the court filings. The matter is continued to August 26, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Madrone Bray, in propria persona, Petitioner.

At the outset, Petitioner is reminded of the several outstanding issues with this case and encourages Petitioner to seek legal counsel. Petitioner offers an update regarding the delays in addressing the several issues listed in the tentative ruling and states that they are currently not in the position to hire counsel.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to May-28-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Petitioner is instructed to file a petition by May-21-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
